sourceNotes: All native select controls use identical label and submitted value (placeholder 'Please Select' submits empty string)
City/Municipality and Barangay are dependency-driven cascading selects sourced from the MMDC EnrollMate location catalog
Specialization values change dynamically based on Major selection
Address sub-fields (Addrline1, Addrline2, Province, Citymun, Barangay, Zipcode) are conditional on Country = Philippines
Parent personal-info fields (names, dates, contact) are conditional on Living Status = Living
Guardian personal-info fields are conditional on guardian = Others
Fields with required_when_condition_met=true are enforced by Zod superRefine when their conditional_on parent matches
Doctor's Report (DR) file upload appears when withMedicalCondition = Yes
